description:
In the first version of problem 3646, e and bass found a nice additional solution. As bass mentioned, that solution is worth a problem of its own. Ok, here it is :)

The last white move, WB7, was a mistake - WC7 instead would have secured a jigo. How can Black win now?
sgf:
